properties.name: Canyon Creek Apartments
properties.description: Canyon Creek Apartments offer modern student-friendly living within walking distance of Central Washington University. Residents enjoy quiet courtyards, bike storage, and easy access to downtown Ellensburg shops and restaurants.

unitTypes.name: Studio
unitTypes.description: Compact studio with kitchenette and private bathroom

unitTypes.name: 1 Bed 1 Bath
unitTypes.description: Single bedroom apartment with open living area

properties.name: Riverbend Student Flats
properties.description: Riverbend Student Flats feature furnished apartments designed for students and young professionals. Amenities include study lounges, shared outdoor seating areas, and convenient access to campus transit routes.

unitTypes.name: Shared 3 Bed 2 Bath
unitTypes.description: Rent per bedroom in shared three-bedroom apartment

unitTypes.name: 2 Bed 1 Bath
unitTypes.description: Two-bedroom apartment with shared living room

properties.name: Kittitas Court Residences
properties.description: Kittitas Court Residences provide quiet apartment living just minutes from downtown Ellensburg. The property features tree-lined walkways, covered bike parking, and on-site laundry facilities.

properties.name: Wildcat Commons
properties.description: Wildcat Commons is a residence hall-style building designed for student living. Located near campus recreation facilities, the building includes shared kitchens, study lounges, and high-speed internet.

unitTypes.name: Standard Double
unitTypes.description: Two-person dorm room with shared hallway bathroom

unitTypes.name: Double En Suite
unitTypes.description: Two-person dorm room with private bathroom

properties.name: Valley View Townhomes
properties.description: Valley View Townhomes offer spacious multi-level housing near campus and downtown Ellensburg. Each unit includes a full kitchen, in-unit laundry, and private patio space.

unitTypes.name: 2 Bed 1.5 Bath Townhome
unitTypes.description: Two-story townhome with living room and kitchen downstairs

unitTypes.name: 3 Bed 2 Bath Townhome
unitTypes.description: Spacious three-bedroom unit with private patio
